name: @auto-job/desktop
description: Career-ops desktop client — bridge + dashboard in one app
author: Hongxi Chen <smyhc1@gmail.com>

scripts.build:server: npm --prefix ../../packages/shared run build && npm --prefix ../server run build
scripts.build:main: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --external:electron --outfile=dist/main.js --format=esm --sourcemap --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cjsRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = __cjsRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:preload && npm run build:main
